views.name: TodayView
views.purpose: Primary interaction screen. Top area shows a large circular progress ring with today's completion fraction (e.g. 5/8) and a motivational label. Below, habits are grouped into collapsible sections by timeOfDay (Morning, Afternoon, Evening, Anytime). Each habit row shows: its SF Symbol icon in a tinted circle, the habit name, a small flame icon with current streak count, and a circular tap-to-complete button on the right. Tapping the button marks the habit done with a scale-up animation and haptic feedback; the row gets a subtle green-tinted background. Completed habits sort to the bottom of their section. The progress ring animates as habits are checked off.

views.name: StreaksView
views.purpose: Visual streak showcase. Top section is a GitHub-style 12-week contribution heatmap calendar — each cell represents one day, colored from gray (0%) through light green to dark green (100% habits completed). Tapping a day shows a popover listing which habits were completed. Below the heatmap, a vertically scrolling list of per-habit streak cards sorted by current streak descending. Each card shows: habit icon, name, current streak with flame emoji and day count, best-ever streak with trophy icon, and a 7-day trailing dot strip (filled green dot = completed, hollow gray dot = missed). Cards for habits with streaks above 7 days get a subtle golden border glow.

views.name: StatsView
views.purpose: Analytics and insights. Top card shows this week's average daily completion rate as a large percentage with a trend arrow comparing to last week (green up arrow or red down arrow). Second section is a horizontal bar chart of completion rates by HabitCategory — each bar is tinted with the category's icon color, label on left, percentage on right. Third section shows best day of the week as a row of 7 day-circles (M T W T F S S) with fill proportional to 4-week rolling average completion rate. Bottom section shows earned milestone badges in a flowing grid — badges for 7-day, 30-day, 60-day, and 100-day streaks with the habit name, using bronze/silver/gold/platinum tinting respectively. Recently earned milestones pulse with a subtle glow animation.

views.name: HabitEntrySheet
views.purpose: Modal sheet for creating or editing a habit definition. Sections: (1) Name text field with placeholder 'e.g. Meditate 10 min'. (2) Icon picker — a scrollable grid of 24 curated SF Symbols commonly used for habits (figure.mind.and.body, book.fill, drop.fill, dumbbell.fill, pencil.and.outline, bed.double.fill, etc.) with the selected one highlighted in hubPrimary. (3) Category picker using a horizontal scrolling row of labeled icons. (4) Time of Day segmented picker. (5) Target days per week stepper (1–7) with label showing 'Daily' for 7 or 'X days/week' otherwise. Save button at bottom, disabled until name is non-empty.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeHabits
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All habits where isArchived is false, sorted by timeOfDay ordinal then name alphabetically

viewModelComputedProperties.name: habitsByTimeOfDay
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Active habits grouped by their timeOfDay value for sectioned Today view display

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCompletions
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Set of habit IDs that have been marked complete for today, persisted in UserDefaults keyed by date string

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of today's completed habits divided by total active habits count (0.0 to 1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCompletedCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of habits completed today for display in progress ring numerator

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreaks
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Maps each habit ID to its current consecutive-day streak count, computed by walking backwards from yesterday checking completion records

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestStreaks
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Maps each habit ID to its all-time longest streak, updated whenever currentStreak exceeds the stored best

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average of daily completion rates for the current Mon–Sun week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Same calculation for the prior week, used for trend comparison arrow

viewModelComputedProperties.name: completionsByCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: This week's completion rate per category, computed as average of per-habit rates within each category

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dayOfWeekAverages
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 7 doubles (Mon=0 through Sun=6) representing 4-week rolling average completion rate per weekday

viewModelComputedProperties.name: heatmapData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 12-element array of 7-element arrays, each Double is a daily completion rate (0.0–1.0) for the calendar heatmap, ordered oldest week first

viewModelComputedProperties.name: achievedMilestones
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All milestone achievements (7, 30, 60, 100 day thresholds) across habits, sorted by date descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: atRiskStreaks
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Habits with active streaks of 3+ days that have NOT been completed today — shown as gentle reminders

dailyGoal.description: Complete all active habits scheduled for today

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A streak counts consecutive days a habit was marked complete. Walking backwards from yesterday, each completed day increments the streak; the first missed day stops counting. If a habit targets fewer than 7 days/week, only scheduled days count — unscheduled days are transparent and do not break or extend the streak. Today's completion is shown visually but only locks into the streak at end-of-day. A streak resets to 0 on the first missed scheduled day.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: this week's average daily completion rate vs last week's, shown as percentage delta with directional arrow. Secondary: per-category completion rates to identify neglected areas. Tertiary: day-of-week analysis using 4-week rolling average to surface strongest and weakest days.
insights: Streak milestones: celebrate 7-day (bronze), 30-day (silver), 60-day (gold), 100-day (platinum) consecutive completions per habit
At-risk streaks: surface habits with 3+ day streaks not yet completed today as gentle nudges
Consistency score: percentage of all scheduled habit-days completed over the trailing 30 days
Best day of week: which weekday has the highest 4-week rolling average completion rate
Category balance: flag categories with completion rates below 50% as areas needing attention
Trend direction: week-over-week completion rate change with positive/negative framing
